title: Mobile App Security + Marketplace Scanner — OWASP Mobile Remediation
description: test_mobile_app_security_engine.py (67 tests, 5 platforms) and test_vuln_scan_engine.py cluster with test_marketplace.py and test_audit_management_engine.py. The mobile scanner covers OWASP Mobile Top 10 finding ingestion and scan lifecycle, but static analysis of .apk/.ipa binaries is not implemented — findings are ingested from external tools rather than computed internally.
missing: APK static analysis: use androguard (pip) to extract permissions, hardcoded secrets, and insecure API calls from uploaded APK binaries
IPA binary analysis: use jtool2/class-dump via subprocess to extract entitlements, ATS exceptions, and URL schemes from IPA archives
Marketplace dependency check: cross-reference app third-party SDK versions against vuln_intelligence_engine CVE database automatically
